code:
%%{Infra_EtcdCluster}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_IngressController] --> Pending: TodoCreatedEvent
    Pending --> InProgress: TodoStartedEvent
    InProgress --> Completed: TodoCompletedEvent
    Completed --> InProgress: TodoReopenedEvent
    Pending --> Cancelled: TodoCancelledEvent
    InProgress --> Cancelled: TodoCancelledEvent
    Pending --> Deleted: TodoDeletedEvent
    InProgress --> Deleted: TodoDeletedEvent
    Completed --> Deleted: TodoDeletedEvent
    Cancelled --> Deleted: TodoDeletedEvent
    
    %% State styling with classes
    classDef pendingState fill:#2980B9,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:white
    classDef inProgressState fill:#F39C12,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:black
    classDef completedState fill:#27AE60,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:black
    classDef cancelledState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:white
    classDef deletedState fill:#C0392B,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:white
    
    class Pending pendingState
    class InProgress inProgressState
    class Completed completedState
    class Cancelled cancelledState
    class Deleted deletedState
    
    %% Notes
    note right of Pending
        Todo is created but not yet started
        Can be assigned to users
        Can be modified freely
    end note
    
    note right of InProgress
        Todo is actively being worked on
        Progress can be tracked
        Due dates and priorities can be set
    end note
    
    note right of Completed
        Todo has been marked as completed
        Completion date is recorded
        Can be reopened if needed
    end note
    
    note right of Cancelled
        Todo has been cancelled
        Reason for cancellation is recorded
        Cannot be restarted, but can be referenced
    end note
    
    note right of Deleted
        Todo has been permanently deleted
        Cannot be recovered
        All associated data is soft-deleted
    end note
repo_description: Free and Open Source ERP platform

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个任务状态流转图，核心状态包括：待处理（Pending）、进行中（InProgress）、已完成（Completed）、已取消（Cancelled）和已删除（Deleted）。起点是待处理状态。
明白，起点是IngressController触发TodoCreatedEvent进入Pending。那从Pending可以流转到哪些状态？
Pending可以启动任务进入InProgress，也可以直接取消或删除。另外，InProgress完成后能到Completed，但Completed还能重新打开回到InProgress。

确认一下流转关系：Pending→InProgress（TodoStartedEvent），Pending→Cancelled（TodoCancelledEvent），Pending→Deleted（TodoDeletedEvent）；InProgress→Completed（TodoCompletedEvent），InProgress→Cancelled，InProgress→Deleted；Completed→InProgress（TodoReopenedEvent），Completed→Deleted。这样对吗？
对的，还有Cancelled也能被删除，Deleted是终态。另外给每个状态加上颜色区分和备注说明吧。
好的，我来设置样式：Pending用蓝色（pendingState），InProgress用橙色（inProgressState），Completed用绿色（completedState），Cancelled用灰色（cancelledState），Deleted用红色（deletedState）。同时给每个状态添加右侧备注。
备注内容我确认一下：Pending备注写"任务已创建但未开始，可分配给用户，可自由修改"；InProgress写"任务正在积极处理中，可跟踪进度，可设置截止日期和优先级"；Completed写"任务已标记完成，记录完成日期，必要时可重新打开"。
收到，还有Cancelled和Deleted的备注：Cancelled是"任务已取消，记录取消原因，无法重启但可引用"；Deleted是"任务已永久删除，无法恢复，所有关联数据软删除"。这样完整了吗？
完整了，所有状态和流转都覆盖了，样式和备注也清晰。可以定稿了。
